queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_closed, SUM(CASE WHEN gm.graduation_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS joined_gm, SUM(CASE WHEN gm.liquidity_sol_t30 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_liq, SUM(CASE WHEN gm.holder_count IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_holders, SUM(CASE WHEN gm.bc_velocity_sol_per_min IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_vel FROM copy_trades ct LEFT JOIN graduations g ON g.mint=ct.mint LEFT JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id=g.id WHERE ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL

SELECT CASE WHEN ct.net_sol>0 THEN 'win' ELSE 'loss' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(ct.net_sol),4) AS avg_net, ROUND(SUM(ct.net_sol),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(gm.liquidity_sol_t30),1) AS liq, ROUND(AVG(gm.holder_count),1) AS holders, ROUND(AVG(gm.top5_wallet_pct),1) AS top5, ROUND(AVG(gm.dev_wallet_pct),2) AS dev, ROUND(AVG(gm.token_age_seconds),0) AS age_s, ROUND(AVG(gm.bc_velocity_sol_per_min),1) AS vel FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.mint=ct.mint JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id=g.id WHERE ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bucket

SELECT CASE WHEN gm.liquidity_sol_t30 IS NULL THEN 'z_null' WHEN gm.liquidity_sol_t30<40 THEN 'a_lt40' WHEN gm.liquidity_sol_t30<70 THEN 'b_40_70' WHEN gm.liquidity_sol_t30<120 THEN 'c_70_120' ELSE 'd_ge120' END AS liq_bucket, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN ct.net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3) AS win_rate, ROUND(SUM(ct.net_sol),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(ct.net_sol),4) AS avg_net FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.mint=ct.mint JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id=g.id WHERE ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY liq_bucket ORDER BY liq_bucket

SELECT CASE WHEN gm.holder_count IS NULL THEN 'z_null' WHEN gm.holder_count<50 THEN 'a_lt50' WHEN gm.holder_count<150 THEN 'b_50_150' WHEN gm.holder_count<250 THEN 'c_150_250' ELSE 'd_ge250' END AS holder_bucket, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN ct.net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3) AS win_rate, ROUND(SUM(ct.net_sol),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(ct.net_sol),4) AS avg_net FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.mint=ct.mint JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id=g.id WHERE ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY holder_bucket ORDER BY holder_bucket

SELECT CASE WHEN gm.top5_wallet_pct IS NULL THEN 'z_null' WHEN gm.top5_wallet_pct<15 THEN 'a_lt15' WHEN gm.top5_wallet_pct<25 THEN 'b_15_25' WHEN gm.top5_wallet_pct<40 THEN 'c_25_40' ELSE 'd_ge40' END AS top5_bucket, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN ct.net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3) AS win_rate, ROUND(SUM(ct.net_sol),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(ct.net_sol),4) AS avg_net FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.mint=ct.mint JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id=g.id WHERE ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY top5_bucket ORDER BY top5_bucket

SELECT CASE WHEN gm.dev_wallet_pct IS NULL THEN 'z_null' WHEN gm.dev_wallet_pct<1 THEN 'a_lt1' WHEN gm.dev_wallet_pct<3 THEN 'b_1_3' WHEN gm.dev_wallet_pct<5 THEN 'c_3_5' ELSE 'd_ge5' END AS dev_bucket, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN ct.net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3) AS win_rate, ROUND(SUM(ct.net_sol),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(ct.net_sol),4) AS avg_net FROM copy_trades ct JOIN graduations g ON g.mint=ct.mint JOIN graduation_momentum gm ON gm.graduation_id=g.id WHERE ct.strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND ct.status='closed' AND ct.net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dev_bucket ORDER BY dev_bucket

WITH ranked AS (SELECT net_sol, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY strategy_id, mint ORDER BY entry_ts) AS ord FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL) SELECT CASE WHEN ord=1 THEN 'e1_first' WHEN ord=2 THEN 'e2_second' WHEN ord=3 THEN 'e3_third' ELSE 'e4_fourth_plus' END AS entry_ord, COUNT(*) AS n, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END),3) AS win_rate, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4) AS avg_net FROM ranked GROUP BY entry_ord ORDER BY entry_ord

WITH per_mint AS (SELECT mint, COUNT(*) AS entries, SUM(net_sol) AS net FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id='copy-hotlead-hold30m' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mint) SELECT entries, COUNT(*) AS n_mints, ROUND(SUM(net),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(net),4) AS avg_net_per_mint FROM per_mint GROUP BY entries ORDER BY entries

WITH per_mint AS (SELECT mint, COUNT(*) AS entries, SUM(net_sol) AS net FROM copy_trades WHERE execution_mode='live_micro' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mint) SELECT entries, COUNT(*) AS n_mints, ROUND(SUM(net),3) AS tot_net, ROUND(AVG(net),4) AS avg_net_per_mint FROM per_mint GROUP BY entries ORDER BY entries
